title: Questions for Alec
excerpt: Do you remember your childhood dreams? Faintly.
body:
Do you remember your childhood dreams?
Faintly.

Morning shower or evening?
It depends on the season and what my schedule is like.

Is there anything you regret not doing?
Becoming an artist.

What was your first job?
Camp counselor.

What would you put on your tombstone?
A. L. Bahta 1994 - ????

What would be your last meal?
Double cheeseburger with fries and oreo shake.

What are you reading?
Keith McNally's memoir, quite slowly.

What movie have you seen the most times?
Home Alone 2

Thoughts on love?
It is

What are your beauty secrets?
Sleep when I can

How do you know when you've had enough?
When I have a psychotic break.

When do you get nervous?
Waking up and going to sleep.

What's living on your nightstand?
A silver lamp, glass of water, tiger balm, and a ceramic owl I am strangely attached to.

Favorite thing about the city you live in?
You can just do whatever.

What makes you smile?
Things that are funny, kind, clever, or cute.

Where have you been kicked out of?
A party at Shinsen.

What keeps you here?
Faith.
